title: BLE NUS one-directional communication
description: Central can send to Peripheral but receives nothing back. Real RTT logs from two nRF52840 DKs.
honestLabel: Logs pre-captured for this demo — connect a board to capture live.
bugSummary: Missing bt_gatt_subscribe call in discovery_complete — central never subscribes to NUS TX notifications, so peripheral→central data is silently dropped.
